layout.footerTagline: The reference platform connecting individuals and artisans committed to upcycling and the circular economy.

home.heroSubtitle: Connect with artisans passionate about upcycling to transform, repair, or reuse your belongings sustainably.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Explore the different fields where our artisans work their magic to upcycle your items.
home.catFurnitureDesc: Restoration of antique furniture, creation of decorative pieces from recovered materials.
home.catElectronicsDesc: Repair and reuse of small electronic devices.
home.catOtherDesc: Toys, books, sporting goods, and much more.
home.providerCtaTitle: Are you an artisan or service provider?
home.providerCtaText: Join our growing community. Offer your services, gain visibility, and contribute to the circular economy.

prestations.heroSubtitle: Transform your everyday items into unique pieces with the help of our local artisans. Give your interior a second life while protecting the planet.

community.heroSubtitle: Share, learn, and inspire the ecological transition through creative upcycling.
community.projectsSubtitle: The tangible impact of our community
community.demoProjectDesc: Created by {'@'}Atelier_Eco, this chair uses 100% oak wood scraps and recycled freight straps. An example of circular furniture.
community.demoSecondaryDesc: By {'@'}GreenCity - 12 bottles saved from the landfill.

forumCategories.headerSubtitle: Explore our themed spaces and join an engaged community shaping the future, one item at a time.
forumCategories.cat1Desc: Learn how to treat and reuse wood, metal, plastic, and textiles for your next creations.
forumCategories.cat2Desc: Learn transformation, painting, and assembly with our experts.
forumCategories.cat3Desc: Share your successes and get inspired by community creations.
forumCategories.cat4Desc: Calculate your Upcycling Score and learn how to reduce your carbon footprint by design.
forumCategories.cat5Subtitle: A problem? The community has the solution.
forumCategories.cat5Desc: Need technical advice or a hand on a specific project? Post your questions here.
forumCategories.cat6Desc: Monetize your creations, find local partners, and grow your circular artisan business.
forumCategories.ctaTitle: Can't find what you're looking for?
forumCategories.ctaSubtitle: Suggest a new category or start a general thread.

depot.title: Drop off an item
depot.subtitle: Give your items a second life. Fill in the details below to start your drop-off request in our circular ecosystem.
depot.photoTip: Tip: Sharp, well-lit photos speed up the validation process.
depot.fieldDetailsPlaceholder: Describe the dimensions, materials, or history of the item...
depot.howItWorksDesc: Once submitted, our experts will validate your item within 24 hours. You'll then receive a drop-off voucher for the nearest collection point.
depot.submittedAlert: Request submitted! Our experts will respond within 24 hours.
depot.errorRequired: Please fill in the name and description.
depot.authRequiredDesc: To submit a drop-off request, you must first log in to your account.
depot.tutorialTitle: Tutorial: How to submit an item?
depot.tutorialIntro: Follow these steps to submit a drop-off request and give your items a second life.
depot.tutorialStep1Desc: Upload 1 to 3 photos of your item: main face, detail and different angle. Clear photos speed up validation.
depot.tutorialStep1Tip: Tip: use a plain background and good lighting for clearer photos.
depot.tutorialStep2Desc: Give it a clear name, a precise description (dimensions, materials, features) and indicate its estimated weight if possible.
depot.tutorialStep2Tip: The more precise your description, the faster the validation!
depot.tutorialStep3Desc: Select the category that best matches your item. This helps our team process it faster.
depot.tutorialStep4Desc: Specify the item's condition (good, used or broken) then click Submit. Our team validates your request within 24 working hours.
depot.tutorialStep4Tip: You'll receive a confirmation email once your drop-off is validated.
depot.tutorialTip: Tip: the more precise your description, the faster the validation. Feel free to mention the item's history!

depotConfirmation.title: Drop-off request accepted!
depotConfirmation.subtitle: Your item has been validated. Here is your drop-off voucher to present at the collection point.
depotConfirmation.step1Desc: Download and print the drop-off voucher or save it on your phone.
depotConfirmation.step3Desc: Present the QR code {qrCode} at the collection point terminal to finalize the drop-off.
depotConfirmation.notFoundDesc: This request does not exist or does not belong to you.
depotConfirmation.pendingSubtitle: Your request is under review. You'll be notified as soon as an admin validates it.
depotConfirmation.rejectedSubtitle: This drop-off request was not validated.
depotConfirmation.qrPending: The QR code will be generated after validation.

planning.title: My Planning
planning.subtitle: View all your upcoming reservations and participations.
planning.calendarDesc: Add your bookings to your favourite calendar app (Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, Outlook…).
planning.calendarHowApple: Apple Calendar: click "Open in Apple Calendar" or go to File → New Calendar Subscription.
planning.calendarHowGoogle: Google Calendar: go to Settings → Other calendars → From URL, paste the HTTPS link.
planning.calendarHowOutlook: Outlook: go to Add calendar → Subscribe from web.
